allow: PowerShell(python -c "import importlib.util as u; print\('PIL', bool\(u.find_spec\('PIL'\)\)\)")
PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; foreach\($f in 'js/data.js','js/render.js','js/main.js'\){ try { node --check $f; if\($?\){ "OK $f" } } catch { "node missing" } })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; foreach\($f in 'js/data.js','js/render.js','js/main.js'\){ try { & node -e "new Function\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('$f','utf8'\)\)"; if\($?\){ "OK  $f" } } catch { "ERR $f -> $_" } })
